existing_features.title: Improve the Admin product editor so an admin can reliably replace and update product/model images (upload new images, remove existing images, and save changes) and have those updated images immediately reflected on the storefront (product cards, product details carousel, and admin list thumbnails).
Offer three payment methods at checkout—UPI, Card, and Cash on Delivery (COD)—and ensure the selected method is saved on the order and shown on the Orders page.
Ensure the Card payment flow uses Stripe Checkout session creation and redirects the user to Stripe, while UPI and COD place the order without redirect and show a confirmation message.

new_feature_requests.summary: Allow updating model/product pictures on the Yunazz Clothing online store (e.g., replace images used for products or site visuals).
Ensure the backend product update path used by the admin UI persists updated images without requiring deletion/re-creation of the product.
Add payment methods: UPI, Card, and Cash on Delivery (COD) at checkout.
